description_long: This bed features a rustic wooden frame with a distinctive arched cutout pattern on both the headboard and footboard, giving it a handcrafted, vintage appearance. The frame is constructed from visibly textured, weathered wood, adding to its aged charm. The mattress is covered with a muted green sheet adorned with a subtle plaid pattern, and two plaid pillows in shades of blue and purple rest at the head of the bed. The bed sits low to the ground on sturdy, blocky wooden legs. The overall design is simple yet sturdy, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings such as parks or communal spaces. The bedding appears soft and inviting, contrasting with the hard, rough-hewn wood of the frame.
description: A rustic wooden bed with arched headboard and footboard, plaid bedding, and a weathered finish. The design is sturdy and vintage, with soft bedding atop a hard wooden frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched footboard, plaid bedding, and two pillows at the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the plaid sheet, and both pillows resting at the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the arched headboard and the bedding arrangement with pillows near the footboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bed's length, plaid bedding, and a single pillow at the headboard.
